about.title:
Discover
Our Studio
about.subtitle: At Tria, we're a software engineering team passionate about building custom digital solutions that drive real business outcomes. From concept to deployment, we combine technical excellence with deep industry knowledge to deliver scalable, high-performance software.
about.subtitle2: Our agile approach ensures rapid delivery without compromising quality. We work closely with you to understand your unique challenges, then architect and implement solutions that are robust, secure, and designed for growth.
about.quote: Building Exceptional Software: Delivering Real Results

team.title:
Our
Development Process
team.subtitle: A disciplined agile approach to software development, refined through years of delivering production-grade applications for clients in Costa Rica and LATAM.
team.subtitle2: From discovery to deployment, we follow a proven methodology that ensures quality, speed, and business outcomes.

testimonials.title:
Client Success
Stories
testimonials.subtitle: Customer reviews are a valuable source of information for both businesses and consumers.

client1.name: Carlos Rodriguez
client1.review: Tria delivered our e-commerce platform ahead of schedule with exceptional quality. Their technical expertise and communication throughout the project was outstanding.

client2.name: Maria Fernandez
client2.review: The mobile banking app they built for us has transformed our customer experience. Performance, security, and user interface exceeded our expectations.

pricing.title: Pricing with Realistic Rates
pricing.subtitle: Reference plans for product development and support. Includes technical leadership, QA, and weekly execution follow-up.
pricing.subtitle2: All plans include weekly execution follow-up, technical leadership, and QA. Custom quotes available for specific requirements.
